name: HUNTINGTON INGALLS INDUSTRIES, INC.
summary: Huntington Ingalls Industries (HII) is America's largest shipbuilder, designing and constructing nuclear and non-nuclear naval vessels including aircraft carriers, submarines, amphibious assault ships, destroyers, and Coast Guard cutters. Through its Mission Technologies segment, HII also provides C5ISR systems, cybersecurity, AI/ML, unmanned autonomous systems, and live/virtual/constructive training solutions primarily to the U.S. Government and Department of Defense.

products.name: LHA Amphibious Assault Ships
products.description: Large deck amphibious assault ships including LHA 8 Bougainville, LHA 9 Fallujah, and LHA 10 Helmand Province for the U.S. Navy.

products.name: LPD Amphibious Transport Dock Ships
products.description: Long-running production program of amphibious transport dock ships; currently constructing LPD 30-35.

products.name: Arleigh Burke Class DDG-51 Destroyers
products.description: Guided missile destroyers; HII is design agent and one of two builders; 36 delivered to the U.S. Navy.

products.name: Legend Class National Security Cutters
products.description: Multi-mission cutter platform designed for the U.S. Coast Guard; HII delivered NSC 10 Calhoun in 2023.

products.name: Gerald R. Ford Class Aircraft Carriers (CVN 78)
products.description: Next-generation nuclear aircraft carriers; HII is exclusive designer and builder; CVN 78-81 under various stages of completion.

products.name: Virginia Class Submarines (SSN 774)
products.description: Nuclear fast attack submarines built in partnership with Electric Boat; multiple blocks contracted and delivered.

products.name: Columbia Class Submarines (SSBN 826)
products.description: Nuclear ballistic missile submarines; HII serves as subcontractor to Electric Boat, building modules for all 12 planned boats.

products.name: Refueling and Complex Overhaul (RCOH)
products.description: Exclusive RCOH services for U.S. Navy nuclear aircraft carriers, covering propulsion, life restoration, and modernization over ~4 years.

products.name: C5ISR Systems and Operations
products.description: Command, control, computers, communications, cyber, intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance systems provided by Mission Technologies segment.

products.name: Unmanned Autonomous Systems
products.description: Development and delivery of unmanned autonomous systems for defense applications through Mission Technologies segment.

products.name: Live, Virtual, and Constructive Training Solutions
products.description: Defense training solutions provided through Mission Technologies segment for military readiness.

products.name: AI/ML Battlefield Decision Tools
products.description: Application of artificial intelligence and machine learning to battlefield decisions, offered through Mission Technologies.

products.name: Defensive and Offensive Cyberspace and Electronic Warfare
products.description: Cyberspace strategies and electronic warfare capabilities offered through Mission Technologies segment.

partnerships.description: Teaming agreement to design and build Virginia class SSN 774 submarines; HII builds specific sections, work alternates for final assembly.
HII serves as subcontractor to Electric Boat for Columbia class SSBN 826 ballistic missile submarine design and module construction.
